evidence: The paper uses Boruta, which "is built on random survival forest (RF), which determines an unbiased grading of the predictive importance." Results emphasize ranking: "in descending order of importance: PlGF, MMP-12, LOX-1..." and "MMP-12 is highlighted as a promising predictive mid-pregnancy biomarker" and "BNP and IDUA were the two strongest biomarkers." The conclusion states the study "found MMP-12 to be the most promising candidate." Logistic regression was applied only to examine "the direction of the individual association" and found significant associations only for late-onset, not validating the Boruta rankings through alternative methods.
